evalAfter: (async()=>{const w=ms=>new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,ms));const b=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,a')].find(el=>/Entrar a MOS/i.test(el.textContent||''));if(b)b.click();await w(2600);try{MOS.nav('config')}catch(e){}await w(2000);try{MOS.setCfgTab('infra')}catch(e){}await w(4200);const c=document.getElementById('infraContenedor');const online=parseInt((c.querySelector('.stat .big')||{}).textContent||'0');const miLive=/live · tú/.test(c.textContent||'');return{online,miLive};})()
